summary: EXP-296 P1 (single find/replace in WIN-066.detail_verdict_text) preempts the defense_survives=3 defender pivot from ISS-1917. The pivot has two prongs: (a) sign-match (NH>SH) is meaningful confirmation, (b) we never claimed the 90–270 W/m² magnitude (it is your imputation). The current text already addresses (a) in a single trailing sentence. P1 expands that into a labeled "Defender pivot anticipated" paragraph with three numbered counters: (1) sign is independently predicted by standard climate science from land-mass + aerosols, with Loeb et al. 2025's specific mechanism quoted (strengthens the existing sentence); (2) the dome cites +0.34 W/m²/decade specifically as confirmation, which contradicts a sign-only retreat; (3) without magnitude derivation the +0.34 coincidence is content-free. The c3 review's other holes (citation Raghuraman→Loeb, TLDR/detail tension, range-width derivation) were closed in prior workspace edits — only the defender pivot remained.
filename_collision_note: EXP-296.json (1KB stub from 2026-05-09T09:17Z; mistargeted WIN-043 in stub, but tracker-canonical EXP-296=WIN-066) is superseded by EXP-296-WIN-066-defense.json. Decider should consult JSON body item_id, not filename, per EXP-295-WIN-063-defense convention.
